title: arthromeris proteus
intro: Arthromeris proteus is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Arthromeris proteus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
